typography.h1: font-outfit text-5xl sm:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-medium text-white
typography.h2: font-outfit text-3xl sm:text-4xl tracking-tight font-medium text-white
typography.h3: font-outfit text-xl sm:text-2xl tracking-tight font-medium text-white

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-8 or p-12 for major containers to give a premium feel.
spacing_and_layout.landing_page_grid: MODE A: The 'Tetris' Grid. Use gap-8 to gap-12. Asymmetrical layout mixing col-span-4, col-span-8 to create tension.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: MODE B: The 'Control Room' Grid. Dense, gap-4 to gap-6. h-full on children to stretch and fill.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Always include internal padding (p-6 or p-8) on bordered containers to prevent text collision.

components.navigation: Crystal Glass style. backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#0A0A0C]/70 border-b border-white/10. Sticky z-50. Saturate-150.

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-cyan-500 text-white font-medium hover:brightness-110 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(139,92,246,0.4)] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/10 transition-all backdrop-blur-md

components.cards: Glassmorphism: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl backdrop-saturate-150 border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.12)]. Hover: -translate-y-1 shadow-lg border-white/20.
components.forms: Dark inputs with bg-white/5 border-white/10 text-white. Focus: focus:ring-1 focus:ring-purple-500 focus:border-purple-500.

motion.hover_states: Slight lift (-translate-y-1) and increased border opacity on cards.
motion.framer_motion_usage: Use Framer Motion for scroll-triggered entrance animations (fade up), staggered lists in the dashboard, and page transitions. Never animate layout directly without motion wrapper.

icons.style: Minimal, clean lines, stroke-width 1.5, primarily white or gradient-tinted.

hero_background.description: Abstract dark purple cyan neon gradient background for hero section. Use with bg-black/50 overlay.

feature_ai_architect.description: Purple and blue light illustration representing the AI Project Architect feature.

developer_dashboard.description: Developer coding in dark mode for CTO Dashboard reference.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a cinematic SaaS landing page using Framer Motion for scroll-triggered animations.
Implement a dark glassmorphism dashboard (GhostBoard AI) for hackathon teams and developers. Focus heavily on a Linear/Vercel level of polish.
Use Shadcn UI for standard components but HEAVILY customize them by stripping default Vercel styles and injecting the dark glassmorphism styles provided in these guidelines.
For the Hero Section, overlay the background image with bg-black/50 or a strong radial gradient so the text remains highly accessible.
Never use pure black #000000; use the tinted #0A0A0C provided.
CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').
Use 'Outfit' for headings, 'Manrope' for body text, and 'JetBrains Mono' for code/terminal blocks. Inject the font_imports string into index.css.
Avoid generic tailwind colors. Use the custom hex values provided in the colors section.
Implement 'Tracing Beam' or subtle neon borders for active elements like pricing cards or the AI CTO recommendation panels.
Do not use HTML inputs directly, use Shadcn Form, Input, Select, etc.
Do not hide navigation links behind a hamburger menu on desktop viewports.
